textPlain: Previously on HN: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=45727696Also, if this site just gives you a server error, that means you're outside its intended service area, apparently...

If you had single sided disks for an Apple ][, and wanted to make them flippy, then you punched another notch, and hole, and then formatted it 4 times, and then cleaned your recording head. Make a whole bunch of them.Ill get back to you about the DEC floppies.
